§6Electric Groundwater Pump§f extracts water from underground aquifers.

§eTask:§f Craft 1x §bElectric Pump§f (pump_electric)

§eFunction:§f
• Provides water for industrial processes
• No need for nearby water sources
• Powered by electricity (HE)

§eUses:§f
• Boiler feed water supply
• Chemical process water
• Industrial cooling water
• Remote base water supply

§aTip:§f Essential for desert or mountain bases without natural water.
